pricing: Pendle PT_TO_ASSET 30-minute TWAP prices PT-apyUSD as a discounted claim on apxUSD, then multiplies by Apyx capped collateralization ratio and divides by Chainlink USDC/USD.
notes: Pendle leg is PT-to-apxUSD, not PT-to-apyUSD; PT-to-apxUSD executable pricing was close, while PT-to-apyUSD routes add conversion/liquidity effects. Main caveat is the custom upgradeable Apyx ratio adapter.
